rulings.Case Title: FLORENTINO VILLANUEVA VS. GMAC MORTGAGE, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, June 9, 2011, line 7, DEFENDANT GMAC MORTGAGE, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE 1ST-5TH CAUSES OF ACTION. THE ALLEGATIONS IN THE AMENDED COMPLAINT SHOW THAT THE PARTIES DID NOT HAVE A MODIFICATION AGREEMENT. FURTHER, PLAINTIFF DOES NOT PROPERLY ALLEGE TENDER. ACCORDINGLY, PLAINTIFF'S 1ST, 2ND & 4TH CAUSES OF ACTION FAIL. THE UCL CLAIM FAILS BECAUSE PLAINTIFF CANNOT STATE A CLAIM FOR INJUNCTION. THERE IS NOTHING TO ENJOIN. FURTHER, PLAINTIFF DOES NOT PRAY FOR RESTITUTION. FINALLY, PLAINTIFF CANNOT ALLEGE A FIDUCIARY RELATIONSHIP BETWEEN THE PARTIES OR ALTERNATIVE FACTS TO SUPPORT A CONSTRUCTIVE FRAUD CAUSE OF ACTION. =(302/LMG)
